title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a tool within Google's Gemini that generates working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from text prompts. The tutorial covers six levels of functionality from document editing to advanced combinations and discusses limitations.
writeup: This tutorial demonstrates Gemini Canvas, a feature inside Google's Gemini that turns text prompts into working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts. It walks through six levels of functionality, beginning with document editing and progressing to advanced combinations of these outputs, and it addresses the tool's limitations. The takeaway is a structured tour of what Canvas can build from prompts and where it falls short.
